name: margin-lead-magnet-framework
description: Margin - The Lead Magnet Framework. A static-first engine for high-conversion documents.
author: Manusco

scripts.export-pdf: vite build && node framework/pdf-engine.js dist/projects/ebook-01/index.html dist/ebook-01.pdf
scripts.export-deck: vite build && node framework/pdf-engine.js dist/projects/deck-01/index.html dist/deck-01.pdf presentation
scripts.pdf:pitch: vite build && node framework/pdf-engine.js dist/projects/margin-pitch/index.html dist/margin-pitch.pdf presentation
